scripts.text: DELETE FROM Fact where Dw_Run_Key = @0 and SRC=@1

Fact_Quey.value: 'WITH mylead (dw_fact_key, dw_holder_key, dw_gate_key, iodatetime, iotime, iodate,      iostatus, dw_run_key, dw_create_dt, dw_agg_key, validentryflag,      lastupdate_dt, rowvers)      AS (SELECT dw_fact_key,                 dw_holder_key,                 dw_gate_key,                 ( CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), iodate, 120) + ' ' +                   CONVERT(VARCHAR, iotime, 108) ) AS                 iodatetime,                 iotime,                 iodate,                 iostatus,                 dw_run_key,                 dw_create_dt,                 dw_agg_key,                 validentryflag,                 lastupdate_dt,                 Row_number() OVER(PARTITION BY dw_holder_key,DW_AGG_KEY ORDER BY (CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),                 iodate, 120) + ' ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, iotime, 108)) ASC) rowvers          FROM   [Metadata_BI].[dbo].[FACT]          WHERE  dw_run_key = 100                  AND iostatus <> 'Invalid Door') SELECT rowvers,        employeename,        reason,        b.iodate                            AS o_iodate,        b.iotime                            AS o_iotime,        iodatetime,        end_iodatetime,        b.iostatus,       a.iostatus as basestatus,       a.leadstatus as leadstatus,        dw_fact_key,        a.dw_holder_key,        dw_gate_key,        a.dw_run_key,        a.dw_create_dt,        a.dw_agg_key,        validentryflag,        a.lastupdate_dt,                COUNT(1) OVER(PARTITION BY rowvers) cnt FROM   (SELECT base.dw_fact_key,                           base.dw_holder_key,                           base.dw_gate_key,                           base.iodatetime,                           base.iotime,                           base.iodate,                           base.iostatus,                           lead.iostatus as leadstatus,                           base.dw_run_key,                           base.dw_create_dt,                           base.dw_agg_key,                           base.validentryflag,                           base.lastupdate_dt,                           Coalesce(lead.iodatetime, NULL) AS end_iodatetime,                           base.rowvers                    FROM   mylead base                           LEFT JOIN mylead lead                             ON BASE.DW_RUN_KEY = 100                                                 AND base.dw_holder_key = lead.dw_holder_key                                AND base.dw_agg_key = lead.dw_agg_key                                AND base.rowvers = lead.rowvers - 1                                and BASE.ioSTATUS = LEAD.IOSTATUS                          )a          INNER JOIN dim_holder DH             ON a.dw_holder_key = DH.DW_HOLDER_KEY                    INNER JOIN oooioentry b             on dh.holder_name = b.employeename                 and (CONVERT (datetime, ( CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), b.iodate, 120) + ' ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, b.iotime, 108)))+1 >= a.iodatetime)                  AND (CONVERT (datetime,( CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), b.iodate, 120) + ' ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, b.iotime, 108) ))+1< a.end_iodatetime)                     inner JOIN agg_fact af          ON af.dw_agg_key = a.dw_agg_key             AND isvalidentry = 1'

Fact_Quey.defaultValue:
'WITH mylead (dw_fact_key, dw_holder_key, dw_gate_key, iodatetime, iotime, iodate,
     iostatus, dw_run_key, dw_create_dt, dw_agg_key, validentryflag,
     lastupdate_dt, rowvers)
     AS (SELECT dw_fact_key,
                dw_holder_key,
                dw_gate_key,
                ( CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), iodate, 120) + ' ' +
                  CONVERT(VARCHAR, iotime, 108) ) AS
                iodatetime,
                iotime,
                iodate,
                iostatus,
                dw_run_key,
                dw_create_dt,
                dw_agg_key,
                validentryflag,
                lastupdate_dt,
                Row_number() OVER(PARTITION BY dw_holder_key,DW_AGG_KEY ORDER BY (CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),
                iodate, 120) + ' ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, iotime, 108)) ASC) rowvers
         FROM   [Metadata_BI].[dbo].[FACT]
         WHERE  dw_run_key = 100 
                AND iostatus <> 'Invalid Door')
SELECT rowvers,
       employeename,
       reason,
       b.iodate                            AS o_iodate,
       b.iotime                            AS o_iotime,
       iodatetime,
       end_iodatetime,
       b.iostatus,
      a.iostatus as basestatus,
      a.leadstatus as leadstatus,
       dw_fact_key,
       a.dw_holder_key,
       dw_gate_key,
       a.dw_run_key,
       a.dw_create_dt,
       a.dw_agg_key,
       validentryflag,
       a.lastupdate_dt,
       
       COUNT(1) OVER(PARTITION BY rowvers) cnt
FROM   (SELECT base.dw_fact_key,
                          base.dw_holder_key,
                          base.dw_gate_key,
                          base.iodatetime,
                          base.iotime,
                          base.iodate,
                          base.iostatus,
                          lead.iostatus as leadstatus,
                          base.dw_run_key,
                          base.dw_create_dt,
                          base.dw_agg_key,
                          base.validentryflag,
                          base.lastupdate_dt,
                          Coalesce(lead.iodatetime, NULL) AS end_iodatetime,
                          base.rowvers
                   FROM   mylead base
                          LEFT JOIN mylead lead
                            ON BASE.DW_RUN_KEY = 100
                                                AND base.dw_holder_key = lead.dw_holder_key
                               AND base.dw_agg_key = lead.dw_agg_key
                               AND base.rowvers = lead.rowvers - 1
                               and BASE.ioSTATUS = LEAD.IOSTATUS
                         )a
        
INNER JOIN dim_holder DH
            ON a.dw_holder_key = DH.DW_HOLDER_KEY
            
      INNER JOIN oooioentry b
            on dh.holder_name = b.employeename
                and (CONVERT (datetime, ( CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), b.iodate, 120) + ' ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, b.iotime, 108)))+1 >= a.iodatetime) 
                AND (CONVERT (datetime,( CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), b.iodate, 120) + ' ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, b.iotime, 108) ))+1< a.end_iodatetime)
            
       inner JOIN agg_fact af
         ON af.dw_agg_key = a.dw_agg_key
            AND isvalidentry = 1'
